600.q: What is the fastest-killing weapon at close range?
600.a: Judge (shotgun)

600.q: What agent uses a Boom Bot that chases enemies?
600.a: Raze

600.q: What is an anti-eco round?
600.a: A round where the better-equipped team plays safely against opponents on a weak buy

600.q: What is a bonus round?
600.a: Keeping cheaper weapons after winning a round instead of immediately rebuying rifles

600.q: What is trade fragging?
600.a: Immediately killing the player who killed your teammate

600.q: What is crosshair placement?
600.a: Keeping your aim at likely head level and common angles before enemies appear

600.q: What is a wallbang?
600.a: Damaging or killing an enemy through a penetrable surface

600.q: What is lurking?
600.a: One player quietly taking map control away from the main group or hit

600.q: What is entrying?
600.a: Being the first player to take space and contact on a site hit

600.q: What is post-plant play?
600.a: The team setup and utility usage after the Spike has been planted

600.q: What is a retake?
600.a: Defenders reclaiming a site after the Spike has been planted

600.q: What is defaulting on attack?
600.a: Spreading out to gather information and pressure before committing to a site

600.q: What is a contact play?
600.a: Approaching or hitting an area with minimal early utility or noise

600.q: What is utility dumping?
600.a: Layering multiple abilities quickly to force enemies off positions

600.q: What is the key difference between the Phantom and the Vandal?
600.a: The Phantom is quieter and has damage drop-off, while the Vandal can one-tap heads at any range

600.q: What is first-shot accuracy?
600.a: How precise a weapon's initial bullet is before spray inaccuracy takes over

600.q: What is an off-angle?
600.a: An unusual holding position that punishes standard crosshair placement

600.q: What is a lineup in VALORANT?
600.a: A pre-planned ability trajectory, often used for post-plant denial

600.q: What is Radianite in VALORANT lore?
600.a: A powerful resource that fuels the world's technology and conflict

600.q: What is a clutch?
600.a: Winning a round alone against multiple opponents

600.q: What is a swing in tactical shooter terms?
600.a: A committed peek used to take a duel or trade space

600.q: What is a fake in VALORANT?
600.a: Selling pressure on one part of the map before quickly attacking somewhere else
